subject: Multi-instrumentalist + Live Looping | World Music
body:
Dear 38 Riv Jazz Club,

I'm a multi-instrumentalist (RAV Vast, guitar, piano) who creates full-band arrangements live using loop technology.

Highlights:

  • Greece's Got Talent (4 YES votes) - live TV performance
  • 4-year sunset residency at luxury Lake Maggiore hotel
  • RAV Vast endorsed artist

My sound blends world music traditions with electronic elements - a fresh take on the live looping format.

Live looping showcase: Rocca Sunrise - Transcendence (RAV + Jarl Flamar)

Would love to discuss booking opportunities.

Best,
Flutur
@flutur_8

subject: Sunset Music | 4-Year Luxury Hotel Experience
body:
Dear Point Ephemere Events Team,

I've spent 4 years as resident artist at Villa Porta (Lake Maggiore), creating ambient sunset sessions for hotel guests.

My format: RAV Vast + subtle live looping, perfect for:

  • Aperitivo hour
  • Poolside/terrace ambiance
  • Special events

Sample: Rocca di Arona - Full Sunrise Set

I'm exploring similar collaborations in France for 2026 season.

Kind regards,
Flutur
RAV Vast Artist | @flutur_8
videoTitle: Rocca di Arona - Full Sunrise Set
